# Signet Test メモ

## 手順

```bash
echo "acceptnonstdtxn=1" >> ~/Library/Application\ Support/Bitcoin/bitcoin.conf
bitcoind -signet -daemon
bitcoin-cli -signet getblockchaininfo | grep -E "blocks|headers|verificationprogress"
# bitcoin-cli -signet stop

python3 inscribe.py prepare html data/input.html --network signet --seed
python3 inscribe.py fund-external state_html.json
python3 inscribe.py fund-external state_html.json --txid <TXID>
python3 inscribe.py build state_html.json -o output.html
python3 inscribe.py broadcast state_html.json --raw > tx.hex
bitcoin-cli -signet sendrawtransaction $(cat tx.hex)
```

## Sparrow の Signet 接続先

Public Server が不安定な場合、Private Electrum で:
- URL: `signet-electrumx.wakiyamap.dev`
- Port: `50002`
- SSL: ON

## 結果

- TXID: `a5c7c9dd3cdfc3f63420e4e5a19673c47e2a6e5124b2d283314746bfeb235a6f`
- ローカル mempool には入るが、ネットワークには伝播せず

## Signet の制限

- ローカルで `acceptnonstdtxn=1` でも、他ノードはリレーしない
- Signet signer も標準ポリシーのため、ブロックに入らない
- Signet での非標準 tx テストは現実的ではない

## Mainnet

- [MARA Slipstream](https://slipstream.mara.com/) が非標準 tx を受け付ける

- https://slipstream.mara.com/status?txid=f7f0272c8fc13d47fec5ea9787a8f3e5b4920142699dfe09f18e73d161cfe766
- https://slipstream.mara.com/status?txid=04d93990146a56a695c387c39ed423bef4ba1892c994254d36cde5d0c2ba5507
- https://slipstream.mara.com/status?txid=2c56b60137769f6529a662d2fd215d6329997543d9aa434c52e90d2a76087961

```
% python3 inscribe.py broadcast state_html.json --raw
=== broadcast (html) ===
  network: mainnet
  tx size: 4,119 bytes

  === RAW TRANSACTION HEX ===
  (Copy and broadcast manually at mempool.space/tx/push)



% python3 inscribe.py broadcast state_pdf.json --raw
=== broadcast (pdf) ===
  network: mainnet
  tx size: 908 bytes

  === RAW TRANSACTION HEX ===
  (Copy and broadcast manually at mempool.space/tx/push)



% python3 inscribe.py broadcast state_zip.json --raw
=== broadcast (zip) ===
  network: mainnet
  tx size: 789 bytes

  === RAW TRANSACTION HEX ===
  (Copy and broadcast manually at mempool.space/tx/push)


```
